name: nostalgic
description: Retro print aesthetics with faded vintage styling, hand-drawn lettering, and the charm of analog design. This mood channels the golden age of screen printing and indie zine culture — sustainable fashion with soul and history.

style.lighting: warm faded afternoon light | soft vintage tungsten | sun-bleached outdoor glow
style.color_grade: faded retro palette | desaturated olive and mustard | vintage film grain
style.camera: vintage portrait style | close-up hand-drawn lettering detail | nostalgic lifestyle medium
style.composition: retro poster-style framing | vintage flat lay with old objects | film strip borders
style.props: vinyl records, retro camera, vintage sunglasses, old magazines, hand-drawn sketches, screen print equipment

copy_tone: Throwback and authentic, referencing analog culture and indie roots. Uses language like 'OG,' 'hand-drawn,' 'limited print run.' Feels like finding a rare vintage tee at a thrift shop.

music.mood: retro funk, vinyl soul, classic indie rock

example_prompt_fragment: A vintage-styled flat lay of a GAIA Print tee with hand-drawn lettering design, laid out on a weathered wooden table beside vinyl records and an old film camera, faded retro color palette in olive green and mustard yellow, vintage film grain overlay, warm afternoon sun-bleached lighting, indie retro fashion photography with analog soul
